voice.title: Voice-Assisted Booking
voice.subtitle: Describe your request in plain language, or type it below. We will extract the details for you to review.
voice.inputPlaceholder: e.g. "I need someone to accompany my mother to her eye doctor appointment next Wednesday at 10 AM for about two hours."
voice.reviewSubtitle: Please check the details below and correct anything that isn't right before submitting.
voice.editFields: You can edit any field below.
voice.sensitiveDataWarning: Please do not include medical records, diagnoses, medications, or insurance information in your request.
voice.medicalContextNote: We noticed this may be a medical appointment. Our companions provide non-medical companionship and chaperoning only — they do not provide medical care, advice, or assistance.
voice.externalProviderDisabled: Voice transcription is handled locally. No audio is sent to external services.
voice.noSeniorLinked: No seniors are linked to your account. Please add a senior before booking.
voice.disclaimerLabel: I understand this is a non-medical companionship service. Companions do not provide medical care, advice, or procedures.
voice.disclaimerRequired: You must acknowledge the disclaimer before submitting.
voice.manualBookingLink: Prefer to fill out the form manually?

accessibility.title: Accessibility Settings
accessibility.subtitle: Adjust the display to make the app easier to use.
accessibility.languageHint: Changes the language of buttons and labels throughout the app.
accessibility.textPreview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
accessibility.reducedComplexityHint: Hides advanced statistics and shows only the most important information.

booking.disclaimer: Senior Companion provides non-medical companionship and chaperoning services only. Our companions are not healthcare professionals and do not provide medical care, advice, treatment, or assistance with medications.
